overall.description: A first-person walk through shallow coastal waters along a sunny beach, transitioning from rocky shoreline to sandy beach with modern stilt houses. The footage appears to be from a high-quality game engine, featuring clear skies and bright midday lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with submerged rocks

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow ocean water with visible sandy bottom and scattered rocks

entered.detail: large boulder partially submerged in shallow water on the left side
rock formation sitting in the ocean surf on the right
calm ocean extending to horizon with bright sun reflection
sandy bottom visible through clear shallow water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through shallow coastal waters. Large rocks emerge from the water on both sides while the sandy seabed is visible below. The ocean stretches to the horizon under a clear midday sky with no other people or structures in sight.

events.description: camera pans left to reveal beach houses on the shoreline while continuing through shallow water

agents.ego_description: turning toward the shore while continuing to wade through shallow water

entered.detail: modern house elevated on wooden stilts along the beach shoreline
rocky outcrop formation along the left shoreline
distant structure visible on the horizon over the water

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left toward the shore, revealing modern stilt houses along the coastline. The rocky cliff face becomes visible on the left while the camera continues moving through the shallow water. A distant pier appears on the horizon as the scene transitions from open water to shoreline approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with stilt houses and rocky formations

events.description: transitioning from water wading to walking on dry sandy beach surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach passing close to stilt-supported beach houses

entered.detail: yellow and white modern house on tall stilts with multiple balconies
large textured rock formation on the sandy beach

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the water onto the sandy beach, approaching a prominent yellow stilt house. Large rock formations dot the shoreline on the left while the ocean remains visible to the right. The camera moves closer to the beach houses, passing the rocky terrain at close range.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal residential beach with multiple beachfront properties

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beachfront with ocean on the right and a row of houses on the left

entered.detail: wooden beach house with balcony facing the ocean
palm trees scattered along the coastline behind the houses

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sandy beach, passing a series of coastal residences on the left. Palm trees become visible behind the houses, and the beach stretches into the distance with the ocean calm on the right. The scene shows a tranquil, empty beachfront with multiple stilt houses lining the shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the open, shallow coastal waters toward a tranquil beachfront lined with modern stilt houses. It begins by wading through clear water where large rocks emerge from a sandy seabed under a bright midday sky. As the camera turns left, the open ocean gives way to a rocky cliff face and the first glimpse of coastal residences and a distant pier on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the water onto the sandy beach, passing close to prominent rock formations and approaching a bright yellow stilt house. Finally, the movement continues along the shoreline, passing a series of residences and palm trees while the calm ocean stretches out to the right.
